lint.command: No lint config found (no .eslintrc, biome.json, or .prettierrc)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when Step 5 interactive verification (docs:dev + browser checks) is required vs when build success is sufficient. Multiple workers (navigation-sidebar, api-reference-pages) skipped interactive checks but reported validatorsPassed: true. The skill should distinguish between validators that can be automated (build) vs those requiring human judgment (UI rendering).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features navigation-sidebar and api-reference-pages both skipped docs:dev verification but reported followedProcedure: true. VAL-NAV-001 through VAL-NAV-004 require visual screenshot evidence but workers only ran build.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add documentation page naming conventions to prevent filename discrepancies like 'security-model.md' vs 'security.md'. Specify that file names should match feature descriptions exactly or be flagged for clarification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature internals-pages specified 'security-model.md' but created 'security.md'. No convention existed to catch this deviation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify base path resolution for VitePress config assets. Document whether '/logo.png' in config.ts resolves relative to base or needs explicit '/shellport/logo.png' prefix.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: custom-theme-branding worker used '/logo.png' in config.ts which VitePress handles correctly by resolving relative to base, but AGENTS.md guidance was ambiguous.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add command for enabling GitHub Pages via API: 'gh api repos/{owner}/{repo}/pages -X POST -f build_type=workflow -f source[branch]=main'. This was needed by deployment-verification to enable GitHub Pages when it wasn't pre-configured.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: deployment-verification feature had to use 'gh api repos/igorls/shellport/pages -X POST' which was not documented in services.yaml.
